fin_documents_source_file_all_or_none_ch.name: fin_documents_source_file_all_or_none_chk
fin_documents_source_file_all_or_none_ch.value: (`fin_documents`.`source_file_bucket` IS NULL AND `fin_documents`.`source_file_key` IS NULL AND `fin_documents`.`source_file_hash_sha256` IS NULL AND `fin_documents`.`source_file_size_bytes` IS NULL AND `fin_documents`.`source_file_mime` IS NULL) OR (`fin_documents`.`source_file_bucket` IS NOT NULL AND `fin_documents`.`source_file_key` IS NOT NULL AND `fin_documents`.`source_file_hash_sha256` IS NOT NULL AND `fin_documents`.`source_file_size_bytes` IS NOT NULL AND `fin_documents`.`source_file_mime` IS NOT NULL)

fin_reconciliations_difference_chk.name: fin_reconciliations_difference_chk
fin_reconciliations_difference_chk.value: (`fin_reconciliations`.`difference_value_cents` IS NULL AND `fin_reconciliations`.`difference_treatment` IS NULL) OR (`fin_reconciliations`.`difference_value_cents` IS NOT NULL AND `fin_reconciliations`.`difference_treatment` IN ('Interest','Penalty','Discount','Fee','Partial'))
